sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Portillo's (PTLO) director receives 12,681 restricted stock units in equity grant
feed.summary: Portillo's Inc. director Eugene I. Lee Jr. was granted 12,681 restricted stock units of Class A common stock on April 15, 2026. These units will fully vest on December 31, 2026, provided he remains with the company. Following this grant, Lee Jr. directly holds 73,479 shares and indirectly owns 416,250 Class A shares through a family trust.

feed.title: Portillo's Inc. (PTLO) grants 40,760 RSUs to its general counsel
feed.summary: Portillo's Inc. (PTLO) announced that its General Counsel and Secretary, Kelly M. Kaiser, was granted 40,760 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 15, 2026. These RSUs will vest in three equal annual installments, contingent on her continued service. Additionally, 1,805 shares were withheld to cover tax obligations from previously vested awards, leaving Kaiser with a direct holding of 144,128 shares of Class A common stock.

feed.title: Portillo's (PTLO) CIO receives 27,173 RSUs and ends with 88,810 shares
feed.summary: Portillo's Chief Information Officer, Keith M. Correia, was granted 27,173 restricted stock units (RSUs) with a three-year vesting schedule, contingent on his continued service. Additionally, 1,206 shares were withheld to cover tax obligations from previously vested awards. Following these transactions, Correia directly holds 88,810 shares of Portillo's Class A common stock.

feed.title: [Form 4] VERISIGN INC/CA Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: VERISIGN INC/CA EVP Danny R. McPherson reported a disposition of 26.7263 common shares at $275.26 per share on April 15, 2026. This transaction was for tax withholding purposes related to vesting restricted stock units and not an open-market sale. Following this, McPherson directly owns 40,195.1627 Verisign shares.

feed.title: Portillo's (NASDAQ: PTLO) awards 40,760 RSUs to Chief Development Officer
feed.summary: Portillo's Inc. (NASDAQ: PTLO) has awarded 40,760 restricted stock units (RSUs) to its Chief Development Officer, Jennifer Pecoraro-Striepling. These RSUs, granted on April 15, 2026, are subject to time-based vesting, with one-third vesting on each of the first three anniversaries of the grant date, contingent on her continued service. Following this award, Pecoraro-Striepling directly holds 40,760 shares of Class A common stock.

feed.title: Portillo's (PTLO) CPO granted 40,760 RSUs, 1,818 shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Portillo's Inc.'s Chief People Officer, Jill Francine Waite, was granted 40,760 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 15, 2026, which will vest over three years. Concurrently, 1,818 shares were withheld to cover tax obligations from previously vested awards. Following these transactions, Waite directly holds 134,018 shares of Portillo's Class A common stock.

feed.title: Portillo’s (NASDAQ: PTLO) CFO receives 90,579-share grant, 3,945 shares withheld for taxes
feed.summary: Portillo's CFO Michelle Greig Hook received an equity award of 90,579 Class A common stock shares as restricted stock units, subject to time-based vesting over three years. Concurrently, 3,945 shares were withheld at $5.52 per share to cover tax obligations from previous awards. Following these transactions, Hook directly holds 305,314 shares of Portillo’s Class A common stock.

feed.title: Constellation Brands (STZ) CEO receives RSUs and large option grant
feed.summary: Constellation Brands (STZ) CEO Nicholas I. Fink received significant equity compensation, including 85,385 restricted stock units (RSUs) and 415,295 non-qualified stock options. The RSUs vest over three years, delivering Class A Common Stock, while the options allow for the purchase of Class 1 (convertible) Common Stock at an exercise price of $164.50 per share, also vesting annually over three years and expiring in April 2036. This compensation package is designed to align the CEO's interests with long-term company performance.

feed.title: Pfizer (PFE) CEO Albert Bourla receives 911 phantom stock units as deferred pay
feed.summary: Pfizer's Chairman & CEO, Albert Bourla, has been granted 911 phantom stock units as part of a deferred compensation plan. These units, valued at $27.11 each, represent an entitlement to a cash payment equivalent to Pfizer's common stock value upon his separation from service. This transaction increases Bourla's total phantom stock unit holdings to 760,090, reflecting deferred compensation rather than direct stock purchases or sales.

feed.title: Fertitta-linked entity writes calls on 275,000 Wynn (WYNN) shares
feed.summary: An entity associated with Tilman J. Fertitta, Hospitality Headquarters, Inc., sold call options on 275,000 shares of Wynn Resorts Ltd (WYNN) common stock. These options have a strike price of $121.00, an expiration date of October 16, 2026, and generated a premium of $4.6831 per share. This transaction is considered a portfolio structuring move rather than a direct sale of common stock, providing upfront income while capping upside for the covered shares.

feed.title: Smucker shareholders get $1.10 dividend June 1; meeting is Aug. 12
feed.summary: The J.M. Smucker Co. (NYSE: SJM) has declared a regular dividend of $1.10 per share, payable on June 1, 2026, to shareholders of record as of May 15, 2026. The company also announced that its Annual Meeting of Shareholders will be held virtually on Wednesday, August 12, 2026, at 1:00 p.m. ET. Shareholders eligible to vote will need their 16-digit control number to access the webcast and participate in voting.

feed.title: ProPetro Announces First Quarter 2026 Earnings Call
feed.summary: ProPetro Holding Corp. (NYSE: PUMP) announced its first quarter 2026 earnings release will be issued on Wednesday, April 29, 2026, before trading opens. The company will host a conference call on the same day at 8:00 AM Central Time to discuss the results. Interested participants can access the call via phone or webcast on ProPetro’s website.

feed.title: NiSource Announces Strategic Energy Infrastructure Agreements to Enhance Customer Value and Economic Growth in Indiana
feed.summary: NiSource Inc. has announced new strategic energy infrastructure agreements, including a long-term contract with a subsidiary of Alphabet Inc. for a large-scale data center in northern Indiana, and an expanded agreement with Amazon Data Services, Inc. These agreements, utilizing NiSource's NIPSCO Generation LLC (GenCo) model, are expected to generate approximately $1.25 billion in cost savings for existing customers, equivalent to $90-$115 annually per residential customer, while also fostering economic growth and creating jobs in Indiana. The initiatives aim to improve grid reliability and resilience, with service for Alphabet beginning in summer 2026 and accelerated cost savings and site activation for Amazon's existing facilities.

feed.title: Netflix co-founder Reed Hastings to leave the company in June
feed.summary: Netflix co-founder Reed Hastings has announced his departure from the company in June to focus on philanthropy and other endeavors. Hastings, currently serving as chairman of Netflix's board, will not seek re-election when his term expires. He expressed confidence in Co-Chief Executives Ted Sarandos and Greg Peters to lead the company forward.

feed.title: Martin Marietta Announces First-Quarter 2026 Earnings Conference Call
feed.summary: Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) will host its first-quarter 2026 earnings conference call on Thursday, April 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time. The company will release its financial results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, before the market opens on the same day. Investors can access a live webcast and supplemental information on the company's website.

feed.title: Verisk Analytics (VRSK) CFO Elizabeth Mann sells 400 shares in preset trade
feed.summary: Verisk Analytics CFO Elizabeth Mann sold 400 shares of common stock at $171.57 per share on April 15, 2026. This transaction was executed under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 plan established on December 11, 2025. Following the sale, Mann directly holds 19,984 shares of the company.

feed.title: KeyCorp Earnings: Strong Net Interest Income Growth and Guidance Raise
feed.summary: KeyCorp reported strong first-quarter results with an 11% year-over-year growth in net interest income and raised its 2026 net interest income guidance to 9%-10% growth. The bank also increased its 2026 average loan growth guidance, primarily driven by commercial lending. Morningstar plans to raise its fair value estimate for KeyCorp due to anticipated higher near-term net interest income growth.

feed.title: Bio-Techne (TECH) CEO exercises 36,500 options and uses 32,088 shares for taxes
feed.summary: Bio-Techne's CEO, Kim Kelderman, exercised 36,500 stock options at $47.60 per share, converting them into common shares. To cover tax obligations, 32,088 shares were withheld at a price of $58.66 per share. Following these transactions, Kelderman directly owns 53,077 common shares and retains substantial unexercised stock options and restricted stock units.

feed.title: Pentagon Seeks Help From Ford and G.M.
feed.summary: The Pentagon is in early talks with Ford and General Motors to explore how the auto industry can help produce military vehicle components and munitions more quickly and affordably. This initiative is driven by concerns over the slow pace and high cost of traditional weapons production and the depletion of U.S. stockpiles due to ongoing conflicts. The discussions harken back to World War II industrial mobilization and aim to leverage commercial manufacturing innovation to bolster the defense industrial base.

feed.title: GE HealthCare expands AI mammography partnership with DeepHealth
feed.summary: GE HealthCare has expanded its partnership with DeepHealth, a subsidiary of RadNet, to advance AI-powered mammography tools globally. This collaboration will introduce second reader workflow capabilities and additional components from DeepHealth's Breast Suite solution, building on a previous agreement. The expanded offering, including ProFound Pro and Safeguard Review, aims to improve breast cancer detection rates, as evidenced by a real-world analysis showing a 21% increase in detection.

feed.title: Texas Instruments board declares second quarter 2026 quarterly dividend
feed.summary: The board of directors of Texas Instruments (Nasdaq: TXN) declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.42 per share of common stock. This dividend is payable on May 19, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 5, 2026. Texas Instruments is a global semiconductor company focusing on analog and embedded processing chips.

feed.title: $1.42 a share: Texas Instruments sets May 19 dividend payout
feed.summary: Texas Instruments (Nasdaq: TXN) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.42 per share, approved by its board of directors on April 16, 2026. This dividend is scheduled to be paid on May 19, 2026, to shareholders who are on record as of May 5, 2026. The declaration reinforces the company's commitment to returning cash to its shareholders.

feed.title: Siminoff trusts trim TTWO stake under 10b5-1 plan (TTWO)
feed.summary: Ellen F. Siminoff, a director at Take-Two Interactive Software Inc. (TTWO), reported indirect sales of 413 shares of common stock through family trusts on April 15, 2026. These sales, executed at $207.66 per share, were conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan established in March 2025. Following the transactions, the trusts each hold 2,000 shares, and Siminoff retains 8,467 direct shares, representing a relatively small adjustment to her overall holdings.

feed.title: onsemi schedules May 4 Q1 report, with webcast replay for 30 days
feed.summary: onsemi (Nasdaq: ON) announced it will release its first-quarter financial results for the period ended April 3, 2026, after market close on Monday, May 4, 2026. A conference call will follow at 5:00 p.m. Eastern Time, with a live webcast and a rebroadcast available for 30 days on the company's Investor Relations website. Historically, similar earnings date announcements have seen a neutral to slightly negative market reaction for ON.

feed.title: Martin Marietta to release Q1 results before Apr. 30 morning call
feed.summary: Martin Marietta (NYSE: MLM) announced a conference call for its First-Quarter 2026 earnings on April 30, 2026, at 10:00 a.m. ET. The company will release its results for the quarter ended March 31, 2026, before the market opens on the same morning. A live webcast and supplemental materials will be available on their investor website, with a replay accessible for one year.

feed.title: A 15-year Berkley veteran takes over its oil and gas insurance arm
feed.summary: W. R. Berkley Corporation has appointed Christopher T. Reichardt as president of Berkley Oil & Gas, effective immediately. Reichardt, a 15-year veteran of the company with over 20 years in the oil and gas insurance industry, previously served as senior vice president and chief underwriting officer. He succeeds Linda A. Eppolito, who will transition to chair of the business.

feed.title: FICO will release quarterly results after market close on April 28
feed.summary: FICO (NYSE: FICO) announced that it will release its second quarter fiscal 2026 results on April 28, 2026, after the market closes. The company will also host a conference call on the same day at 4:30 p.m. Eastern time to discuss the results. A webcast of the call will be available on FICO’s investor relations website and a replay will be accessible through April 28, 2027.

feed.title: Procter & Gamble Flags Low Priced Mini Tender Versus Undervalued Share Estimate
feed.summary: Procter & Gamble (NYSE:PG) has issued a warning to shareholders regarding an unsolicited mini tender offer from Potemkin Limited to buy shares at a price significantly below the current market value of $143.38. P&G is urging investors to reject the offer, emphasizing shareholder protection amidst the stock's mixed recent performance, which includes declines over the past 30 days and year, but a long-term gain over five years. The company highlights a significant pricing gap between the mini tender and its current market price, noting that Simply Wall St estimates the shares are trading 29.7% below fair value and below the consensus analyst target.

feed.title: Short Interest in Jacobs Solutions Inc. (NYSE:J) Rises By 24.5%
feed.summary: Short interest in Jacobs Solutions Inc. (NYSE:J) surged by 24.5% in March, reaching 4,351,038 shares as of March 31st, representing 3.7% of its outstanding shares with a short-interest ratio of 3.9 days. The company's stock currently holds a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating from analysts, with an average target price of $154.60, despite recent mixed analyst updates. Jacobs Solutions also increased its quarterly dividend to $0.36 per share, implying an annualized yield of 1.1%, and reported earnings that slightly beat consensus for the last quarter.

feed.title: Affiliate files Form 144: PENG (NASDAQ: PENG) RSUs sale, 5,000 shares
feed.summary: An affiliate of Penguin Solutions, Inc. (NASDAQ: PENG) has filed a Form 144 notice to sell 5,000 shares of common stock, which are tied to Restricted Stock Units dated April 20, 2022. The filing also disclosed recent 10b5-1 sales by the reporting person, including sales of 12,546 shares on April 9, 2026, 10,046 shares on February 24, 2026, and 1,346 shares on February 10, 2026. These transactions were routed through Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet Holdings, Inc. (NYSE:ZBH) Short Interest Up 24.8% in March
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings (NYSE:ZBH) experienced a significant 24.8% increase in short interest during March, reaching over 10 million shares, representing 5.2% of its shares sold short. Despite varied analyst ratings, with an average "Hold" and a $105.95 target price, the company recently surpassed Q4 earnings estimates with $2.42 EPS and $2.24 billion in revenue, also issuing optimistic FY2026 guidance. Recent insider selling by a SVP and significant institutional investor activity, including a large stake increase by Auto Owners Insurance Co, reflect dynamic sentiment around the medical equipment provider.

feed.title: Ulta bets big on beauty as live experience
feed.summary: Ulta Beauty's second annual "Ulta Beauty World" event in Orlando drew thousands of attendees, demonstrating a growing trend among retailers to blend shopping with live experiences, fandom, and entertainment. This strategy aims to drive engagement and sales, with brands emphasizing the irreplaceable connection of face-to-face interactions for boosting awareness and loyalty. Despite millions attempting to secure tickets, the event successfully facilitated hands-on demos, giveaways, and makeovers, allowing brands to connect directly with Ulta's core shoppers.

feed.title: U.S. Markets Moved Upward Thursday; Albemarle Climbed Highest
feed.summary: U.S. stock indexes saw an increase on Thursday, with the Dow Jones Industrial Average rising 0.36%, the S&P 500 increasing 0.26%, and the Nasdaq Composite gaining 0.24%. Albemarle was highlighted as the highest climber among the stocks mentioned.

feed.title: [Form 4] Pony AI Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Pony AI Inc. director Jackson P. Tai reported an acquisition of 6,692 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on April 14, 2026, as equity compensation. These RSUs, which represent the right to receive one Class A ordinary share each upon vesting, are scheduled to vest on the first anniversary of November 27, 2026, and have no expiration date. Following this grant, Tai directly holds 6,692 RSUs, with no reported open-market transactions.

feed.title: Albemarle soars to nearly three-year high as lithium rebound sparks momentum (NYSE:ALB)
feed.summary: Albemarle (ALB) shares surged by 16.3%, reaching their best close since July 2023, largely due to a significant rebound in global lithium prices. The company's stock performance led the S&P 500 leaderboard on Thursday, indicating strong market momentum.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Cuts Insight Enterprises (NASDAQ:NSIT) Price Target to $80.00
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for Insight Enterprises (NASDAQ:NSIT) from $90.00 to $80.00, maintaining an "underweight" rating on the software maker's stock. This adjustment implies a potential upside of 5.86% from the stock's previous close. Other analysts have also recently updated their ratings, contributing to a consensus "Reduce" rating and an average price target of $96.67 for the company.

feed.title: JPMorgan Chase & Co. Issues Pessimistic Forecast for Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) Stock Price
feed.summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. has lowered its price target for Super Micro Computer (NASDAQ:SMCI) stock from $40.00 to $28.00, maintaining a "neutral" rating and suggesting a slight downside. This follows similar price target reductions and "neutral" or "market perform" ratings from other firms like Citigroup and Northland Securities, despite some analysts still holding "buy" or "outperform" ratings. The company recently reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates, but faces headline risks from pending class-action lawsuits and critical media commentary.

feed.title: Onto Innovation schedules May 5 earnings call after market close
feed.summary: Onto Innovation Inc. (NYSE: ONTO) announced it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results shortly after market close on May 5, 2026. The company will host a conference call and audio webcast at 4:30 p.m. ET on the same day, featuring CEO Michael P. Plisinski and CFO Brian Roberts. Interested parties can access the call via dial-in or live webcast on the company's website.

feed.title: Opera schedules April 28 earnings release and 8 a.m. ET call
feed.summary: Opera (NASDAQ: OPRA) will release its first quarter 2026 financial results before market open on April 28, 2026. Management will host a conference call and live webcast on the same day at 8:00 a.m. ET to discuss the results. The earnings release and webcast will be available on investor.opera.com, with dial-in numbers and a confirmation code provided for listeners.

feed.title: CPI and Fiserv Forge Major Alliance to Modernize Instant Issuance Experience for Financial Institutions
feed.summary: CPI Card Group (Nasdaq: PMTS) and Fiserv (Nasdaq: FISV) have formed a major alliance to enhance instant issuance capabilities for Fiserv's banking and credit union customers using CPI's Card@Once SaaS solution. This partnership integrates CPI's market-leading platform into Fiserv's extensive customer ecosystem, offering seamless physical and digital card issuance, expanded mobile app integrations, and a cost-effective, cloud-enabled solution. The collaboration aims to modernize the issuance experience, simplify operations for financial institutions, and drive greater customer engagement.

feed.title: Paylocity will detail fiscal Q3 results after market close May 7
feed.summary: Paylocity (NASDAQ: PCTY) has scheduled its Q3 fiscal 2026 earnings conference call for Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 4:00 pm CT (5:00 pm ET). The company will issue a press release with results in advance, and a live webcast will be available on its Investor Relations page, with a replay archived online. Paylocity is a leading provider of cloud-based HR, Finance, and IT solutions, headquartered in Schaumburg, IL.

feed.title: Two new hires get rights to 69,850 Protagonist shares in awards
feed.summary: Protagonist Therapeutics (Nasdaq:PTGX) has granted inducement awards to two new employees on April 15, 2026, totaling options for 55,425 shares and restricted stock units (RSUs) for 14,425 shares. The exercise price for options is set at $105.44, matching the closing price on the grant date, and both options and RSUs will vest over a four-year period. These awards were approved by the compensation committee and abide by Nasdaq Rule 5635(c)(4), reflecting a routine equity-based hiring activity for the biopharmaceutical company.

feed.title: GE HealthCare expands mammography collaboration with RadNet’s DeepHealth subsidiary to extend global access to DeepHealth’s AI-powered breast cancer screening solutions
feed.summary: GE HealthCare has expanded its collaboration with RadNet’s DeepHealth subsidiary to advance and commercialize AI-powered mammography tools globally. This initiative builds on their existing partnership by introducing DeepHealth’s enhanced AI-powered Breast Suite, including ProFound Pro and Safeguard Review, which aims to improve breast cancer detection and operational efficiency in screening programs. The companies will showcase their latest advancements at the SBI Annual Symposium, emphasizing personalized prevention and care for women through AI integration.

feed.title: GE HealthCare takes breast screening AI with 21% higher detection global
feed.summary: GE HealthCare has expanded its collaboration with RadNet's DeepHealth subsidiary to globally distribute advanced AI-powered breast cancer screening solutions. This partnership brings DeepHealth's Breast Suite, which has shown a 21% increase in breast cancer detection rates in real-world analysis, to a wider market. The solutions integrate with GE HealthCare's mammography systems, aiming to enhance early cancer detection and personalized care for women.

feed.title: Director reports 1,025 CenterPoint Energy (NYSE: CNP) shares
feed.summary: CenterPoint Energy director Michael Albert Herman has filed a Form 3, indicating his initial beneficial ownership of 1,025 shares of CenterPoint Energy common stock. This filing officially records his position as an insider of the company and does not represent a new purchase or sale of shares. The document provides details of his direct holdings as a director.

feed.title: CDNS (NASDAQ: CDNS) Form 144 shows brokered notice to sell 21,500 shares
feed.summary: Cadence Design Systems Inc (CDNS) filed a Form 144, indicating a proposed sale of 21,500 common shares valued at $6,653,175.00 through Morgan Stanley Smith Barney LLC. The filing details include 112 shares from an Employee Stock Purchase Plan and 21,388 shares from Performance and Restricted Stock. This Form 144 is merely a notice of intent to sell, not a confirmation of completed sales.

feed.title: [Form 4] Pony AI Inc. Insider Trading Activity
feed.summary: Pony AI Inc. director Mark Qiu was granted 6,692 restricted stock units (RSUs) on April 14, 2026, as reported in a recent Form 4 filing. These RSUs will vest on the first anniversary of November 27, 2026, with each unit convertible into one Class A ordinary share. The grant has no exercise price or expiration date, and after this transaction, Qiu directly holds 6,692 RSUs.

feed.title: CarParts.com Sets First Quarter 2026 Conference Call for Thursday, May 7, 2026
feed.summary: CarParts.com, Inc. (NASDAQ: PRTS) has announced it will hold a conference call on Thursday, May 7, 2026, at 2:00 p.m. Pacific Time to discuss its financial results for the first quarter ended April 4, 2026. The company's CEO, David Meniane, and Interim CFO, Mark DiSiena, will host the webcast, with results being released in a press release prior to the call. CarParts.com is a technology-led e-commerce company specializing in automotive parts and accessories, serving over 2.5 million customers annually.

feed.title: Three $0.05 monthly payouts set for OFS Credit holders through July
feed.summary: OFS Credit Company (OCCI) has declared monthly cash distributions of $0.05 per share of common stock for May, June, and July 2026. Common stockholders participating in the Dividend Reinvestment Plan (DRIP) will receive a 5% discount on shares purchased through reinvested dividends. OFS Credit is an investment company focused on collateralized loan obligation (CLO) equity and debt securities.

feed.title: Wisconsin Electric sets June and July payouts on preferred shares
feed.summary: Wisconsin Electric, a subsidiary of WEC Energy Group, has declared quarterly cash dividends for two series of its preferred shares. Holders of the 3.60% Series will receive $0.90 per share payable on June 1, 2026, while those with Six Per Cent Preferred Stock will receive $1.50 per share payable on July 31, 2026. These dividends provide predictable income to preferred shareholders, with specific record dates set for May 14, 2026, and July 14, 2026, respectively.
